programme.title: The Bank Shot
programme.desc: Fresh from his recent jailbreak, criminal mastermind George C. Scott is already plotting his next bank heist. This time he's thinking big...he's not just taking the loot, he's stealing the whole bank in a film brimming with imaginative silliness.

programme.title: The Bad News Bears
programme.desc: A major surprise as one of 1976's top-grossing films. THE BAD NEWS BEARS is a movie about children that is refreshing, utterly believable, and quite cleverly funny.

programme.title: Bad News Bears In Breaking Training
programme.desc: The story picks up the Bears career a year after their infamous second-place finish in the North Valley League. Faced with a chance to play the Houston Toros for a shot at the Japanese champs, they devise a way to get Texas to play at the famed Astrodome.

programme.title: Bad News Bears Go To Japan

programme.title: Friday Foster

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie's really annoying friend Ginger returns to town. Clare and Donna confront Kelly after finding drugs in the apartment. Brandon, Steve and Joe accept Jonathan's invitation to go flying in biplanes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie tries to pacify Ginger by setting her up with Jonathan. Donna's sorority asks students to go without sex for 24 hours in order to promote abstinence as a means of preventing venereal diseases. Clare bets that Steve cannot make good on his pledge.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Colin visits Kelly and announces that he has kicked his cocaine habit. Kelly gets a roommate, a troubled teenage runaway named Tara. Valerie has the house to herself as Steve and Brandon leave for a ski weekend with Clare, Susan and David.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Susan spend the weekend at her parents' house. Colin and Valerie's new relationship upsets David and Kelly. Joe's older brother Hank comes to town and tries to discourage him from undergoing surgery.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Colin tries to remain strong as he prepares to turn himself in and begin his prison term. Brandon and Susan lose a five-thousand-dollar lottery ticket, leading to a major argument.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Llega a la casa una invitada que promete ponerle picante a estas vacaciones y la bienvenida de los Shores no se hace esperar. Pero no todo es festejo y mientras unos llegan otros deciden partir.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Matheus cambia la dinámica en la casa y las mujeres deliran por el nuevo Shore, pero los hombres no se quedan atrás ya que una bomba argentina los sorprende al llegar junto a Nacha.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha muestra interés por Matheus y Diego explota de celos, aunque la pelea menos pensada se da entre dos mujeres fuertes y el asunto escala en segundos. Se acerca otro juicio en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky es expulsada de la casa y Fernanda decide irse con ella. Chile y Isa se entregan al poliamor y Diana teme sufrir represalias. Los Shores se relajan en la playa pero las insolencias de Diego fastidian a todos.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Aunque las vacaciones ya están por terminarse, el ritmo nunca decae en Acapulco y el Boss tiene sorpresas de despedida para los Shores: Tragos en yate y una fiesta final que promete ser inolvidable.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Ultimo día en Acapulco y los Shores prometen llevar la fiesta a otro nivel. Jacky y Fernanda no quieren quedarse afuera y tienen varias sorpresas preparadas para sus compañeros. Será una fiesta final épica.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con el inicio de las vacaciones, los shores se juntan para dar la bienvenida a los nuevos miembros de la familia. Alba se encuentra cara a cara con Diego y Karime, mientras que Chile toma la decisión de hacer justicia con el ladrón de sus frases.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta en la casa continua y la discusión entre Chile y Diego tiene un desenlace inesperado. Isa toma una decisión que lamentará y un nuevo integrante se une a la familia shore aunque su bienvenida no será la mejor.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La paz y la armonía reinan, y el jefe visita al grupo. Fernanda aparece, pero ignora a "Matryoshka". Carlos vive cinco minutos inolvidables, mientras Karime organiza una cita romántica que podría salir mal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La cita de Karime y Fernanda da un giro inesperado, y el grupo se dirige a una fiesta. Un visitante causa sensación, y Jacky lo invita a la casa, pero los chicos se sienten incómodos y quieren sacarlo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Rocío se une al grupo con ganas de venganza. Santiago y Alba sorprenden a todos con una ceremonia poliamorosa. Diego no puede controlar su bebida y su forma de festejar le pasa factura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta sigue, pero Diego toma una decisión sorprendente. Jaylín se une al grupo y, mientras su bienvenida se descontrola, Karime organiza la primera iniciación en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La iniciación de Alba concluye con éxito, pero Jacky aprovecha a Altafulla para incomodarla. Una nueva invitada llega a la casa y Carlos queda cautivado por su encanto, mientras que José y Beni se enfrentan por la atención de Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky is kicked out of the house. Fernanda supports her and they leave the house together. Charlotte wants to raise awareness and tries to teach the gang rules of good behavior.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: You already know Fernando, Jawy, Tadeo, Caballero, Karime, Manelik, Joyce and Talía. You understand their ability, but will they be able to work? My friends, life isn't all about parties.

programme.title: Lockup: Holman: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Burnout is a constant problem and unexcused absences create staff shortages at Alabama's Holman Correctional Facility; that means that designated jobs, like cell searches, which each shift has a requirement to perform, don't always get done.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedians Al Murray and Paul Chowdhry go antiquing with experts James Braxton and Natasha Raskin Sharp. Who will have the last laugh at the Buckinghamshire auction?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Stars of stage, screen and Steps, Ian 'H' Watkins and Claire Sweeney antique hunt near the Welsh border with James Braxton and David Harper. All are aimed for a Harrogate auction.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The antiques rollercoaster arrives on the Kent coast with showbiz friends Peter Andre and Joe Pasquale. All aboard for hair curling, horse vaulting and a lot of old boules.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Radio presenters Janey Lee Grace and Tim Smith rummage in the Cotswolds with antique experts James Braxton and David Harper.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Rev. Richard Coles and actor Joe McFadden scour Scotland for antiques with David Harper and Phil Serrell. A pottery budgie is cheap but what's valuable in an old metal box?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Stars of stage and screen John Partridge and Anita Harris put friendship aside as they compete to find a bargain antique in Lancashire. What will make them a fortune at auction?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedian Russell Kane and presenter AJ Odudu navigate their way around Shropshire looking for antiques. Accompanied by experts Phil Serrell and Margie Cooper.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Presenter Anneka Rice and actor Liz Carr are moseying around the Midlands on a treasure hunt, joined by Phil Serrell and James Braxton, and headed to an auction in Greenwich.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Today's antique shopping stars are sitcom actors Sherrie Hewson and Tony Maudsley. Hoping to get lucky in Leicestershire are dealer Roo Irvine and auctioneer Tim Medhurst.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: BBC Countryfile presenters Charlotte Smith and Tom Heap hit the road in search of antiques with James Braxton and Phil Serrell. Expect ducks, bodgers, a bull and an old friend.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Olympic swimmer Rebecca Adlington OBE and adventurous TV presenter Helen Sketon rummage in the North West with antique experts Roo Irvine and Tim Medhurst.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a second visit to East Sussex as they welcome thousands of visitors to Eastbourne Bandstand.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Fountains Abbey near Ripon in Yorkshire. Objects brought in by visitors include a sentimental jewel.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at the Royal Marines Museum in Southsea. There are some remarkable stories behind today's objects brought to the camera.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts are in Cirencester for this week's show, where they find what could prove the most valuable picture ever seen on the show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a visit to Newstead Abbey. Among the discoveries are a medal for bravery awarded to a pigeon in World War Two.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team arrive at Towneley Hall near Burnley in Lancashire. Despite heavy rain, thousands arrive to show their family treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Scotland where a large crowd awaits the experts at the National Gallery of Modern Art in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: We discover the tantalising stories about what happened to antiques and their owners once the Roadshow cameras have stopped rolling.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Richmond Park in London where they meet visitors bringing their family treasures at the Royal Ballet School.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and team head to the University of East Anglia where they are joined by huge crowds in the shadow of the Sainsbury Centre for Visual Arts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce heads to Exeter Cathedral. Objects under inspection include a table reputed to have been used by Bonnie Prince Charlie.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: After swimming in shark-infested waters, Steve rappels down to a nest of killer bees with a painful outcome; a close encounter with a ragged tooth shark is followed by getting airborne with the black eagle.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve and the crew search for deadly animals in one of the hottest places on the planet; he comes close to a tiny but mighty spider; he tracks down elusive and deadly reptiles.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve is hot on the trail of Africa's big cats; he dons a camouflage suit to beat a leopard at its own game by hunting his crew, but it proves to be a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve showcases some of the largest deadly dinosaurs of all time.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is on a quest to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is on a quest to find the most dangerous dinosaur of all time.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan must overcome his own fear, black bears have a dangerous reputation and attack more people than any other bear in the world, but once he meets Lily, a tolerant bear, mother of Hope, Gordon feels heartbroken.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Summer arrives and Gordon finds out that Tiny the bear cub has been abandoned by her mother.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: It is autumn and Gordon finds out that Hope is back with her mother.

programme.title: Elephant Diaries
programme.desc: A rescue team tries to save a starving orphaned elephant rejected by the rest of the herd; Michaela Strachan meets 2-year-old herd leader Wendi; Jonathan Scott tries to win over Emily, the matriarch of the older elephants.

programme.title: Elephant Diaries
programme.desc: Michaela Strachan follows preparations to move Wendi and five older babies to a new release site; Jonathan Scott keeps an eye on Emily and the 30 larger orphans as they come face to face with Dika and a herd of wild elephants.

programme.title: Elephant Diaries
programme.desc: Wendi and her charges struggle to settle in Ithumba; the older female orphans are separated from Emily's herd; back in Nairobi, the remaining baby elephants must cope without Wendi.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Meet the Sloths
programme.desc: Sloth bromance develops; deadly tummy bug hits the nursery; sloth scientist Becky gets to the bottom of sloth digestion.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Panama is home to one of the largest and most impressive birds of prey in the world - the harpy eagle. To track it down, Steve and the crew have to trek into a remote part of the Darien jungle.

programme.desc: Creating an inexpensive dinner for two that is fit for a king.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Dave and Si show that indulgent entertaining doesn't have to be costly to be spectacular.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Dave and Si Create a gourmet party in lean times.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: The series kicks off with a complete guide to cooking on coals, from lighting the fire to the barbecue essentials; Ainsley also tests different types of barbecues.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting the Greek Island of Alonnisos to sample traditional barbecue consisting of spit-roasted lamb and hortopitta.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting South Africa to find unusual recipes for cooking over coals.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting Thailand to sample a unique recipe for fish and chips and a barbecue cornucopia.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: The history of Jamaican barbecue recipes from the Arawak over 1,200 years ago.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Sampling the cuisine of Australia.

programme.desc: An outdoor eating gastronomic journey through the Americas with the irrepressible Ainsley Harriott; Canada's most easterly province, Newfoundland, provides inspiration for the first of Ainsley's meals.

programme.title: Ainsley's Big Cook Out
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott prepares honey grilled fruit with ember roast almonds on the shores of Lake Michigan and visits one of Chicago's most famous delis.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel Slater creates a tasty feast from ingredients found at a local allotment.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel starts off with the remains of the Sunday roast.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel creates a feast from what he finds in his vegetable patch.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Mouth-watering chocolate cookies and crispy duck with honey and figs.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Food writer Nigel Slater looks at ingredients that provide a contrast on the plate.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel makes comfort foods that hits the spot.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles takes to the road to catch up with families and communities to find out what happened after the cameras left; a second look at how the builds leave a meaningful legacy across the country and change the lives of thousands of people.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team head to Nottingham to help the Erasmus family complete their kitchen; the team design an ultra-modern kitchen diner.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: With the help of architectural designer Charlie Luxton, an army of local trades people, and lots of goodwill, the team transforms an ex-council house into a family home.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and a team of experts help to salvage people's homes which have been wrecked by botched DIY projects.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team travel to Norfolk to help Liz and Neil Capper renovate the bedroom in their beautiful little cottage.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick and the team head to Watford to help Lucy and Mario renovate a kitchen that needs to be medically clean.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team head to Edmonton to help the Parenti family finish the extension and renovation work on their home.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team head to Kingston-Upon-Thames to help Nathan and Chelsea transform a toy room into a dining room for their grandparents.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team head to Kent to create two stunning rooms for the Howard family's Victorian cottage.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Kate's home remained in a complete state of disarray when builders left her extension unfinished, so the team tries to bring some warmth to her life.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team helps the Curry family in Halstead to solve a two year-old problem that has left the family using a bedroom for a lounge.

programme.title: DIY SOS

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: The house rallies against Sarah; Milyn's constant celebrity name-dropping rubs one of her housemates the wrong way.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: The roommates try to push Sarah out of the house; boyfriend troubles affect Teresa.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: Janelle gets on Shanae's bad side; Tiana's attempts to seduce Gina could permanently damage their friendship.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When Bill went from being one of The Chicken Bone's customers to its owner, his lack of experience was evident, and now it's up to Jon to help get things back on track.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Owners Scott and Donna face foreclosure if Jon is unable to rescue Kid Chilleen's Badass BBQ by evicting the bar's equine and biker visitors.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A successful St. Louis, MO, restaurateur risks everything when she decides to add a downtown sports bar to her portfolio and put her out-of-control nephew in charge.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When a military veteran/bar owner responds to criticism of his philanthropic work with nasty comments online, his business is sent into a tailspin.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In order to save a failing Irish pub in Philadelphia, Jon must reinvigorate its owner, who was once a star chef.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After running a successful floral business for two decades, owner Randi thought she could parlay that success into a budding new bar. Unfortunately, she never rose to the occasion.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get an overly-emotional bar owner to stop wallowing and take action to save his bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of Utah's The Fifth realized too late that running a successful bar wasn't as easy as his dad made it look, and now he's poised to squander his family's legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chefs and best friends Christ and Mitch decided to open The Hammer in Las Vegas to cater to locals, but then a case of pneumonia caused everything to fall apart.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a Yankee family learn to do business in the South if he hopes to save the poorly themed Characters Quarters in North Carolina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help the owner of The Kasbah in Aurora, CO, find a less rowdy clientele if he's going to save the once-thriving urban hot spot.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An unappealing name is just the first of many problems plaguing Fatballs Sports Bar & Grill, where Jon must get a belligerent owner to accept responsibility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A military hero about to be redeployed needs more than his bar rescued, as his problematic drinking threatens to cost him his livelihood and relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh takes over at Baywatch while Sean, Jason, and Zack go to compete in a 12-mile race of natural obstacles. Jessie’s presence at the race creates turmoil. Leigh and Jenna pretend to be lesbian lovers.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: For a rescue, Sean is awarded a free week at Hilton Hawaiian Village, which he declines. Zack pretends he’s Sean and enjoys all the freebies until Sean shows up! A pretty fashion photographer thinks Jason has top model potential.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean has a decision – move to Australia or stay in Hawaii. Zack sees Leigh naked, leading to complications with her fiancé Sam. Kekoa dumps JD and becomes a party girl. When Sam leaves Leigh at the altar, Sean asks Leigh to marry him instead.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig rescues a woman that develops a fatal attraction to him, placing Craig's wife in mortal danger. A fishing trip goes horribly wrong when the boat explodes and Mitch and his mentor Al have to rescue its passengers, including Mitch’s son Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Playing hooky from summer school, Lt. Mitch Buchannon's son Hobie gets dangerously involved with reckless jet skiers.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: During the hottest day of the summer, Craig has to choose between his career as a lawyer and the job he loves being a Baywatch lifeguard. The choice is made when two boys get trapped in a storm drain which is rapidly filling with water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie must come to terms with his past when he confronts a gang of "surf rats" lead by a former friend from his reform school days. Trevor begins to doubt his lifeguarding skill when his girlfriend almost drowns because of his arrogance.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie overhears his divorcing parents arguing and boats away to a deserted island with two friends, only to have their boat drift away, leaving them stranded on the island with modern day pirates!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After their plane crashes, two robbers attempt to retrieve their suitcase full of stolen money from the ocean. Meanwhile, Mitch and Gayle go to court over custody of Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A wealthy older man drowns under suspicious circumstances in front of Jill Riley's tower. Jill endures the pain of losing her first victim, becoming obsessed with unraveling whether his death was an accidental drowning or murder.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While housesitting for Craig and Gina, Eddie takes in a runaway whose life is threatened by her mobster boyfriend. Meanwhile, Trevor enters Baywatch rookie school to become a certified LA County lifeguard.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie warns Shauni that her new boyfriend Andrew is not a good guy. She ignores Eddie until Andrew gives her a black eye. Meanwhile, Craig and Mitch must stop an out of control party boat before it crashes into the crowded Santa Monica pier.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Several people are murdered at the beach by a mysterious man in ghoulish make-up and Eddie is knocked unconscious by what he describes as a "cretin." Eddie's report is met with skepticism until the identity of the killer is dramatically revealed.

programme.title: Bellator 214: Fedor vs Bader
programme.desc: A new Heavyweight champion will be crowned in the Bellator MMA cage when the last emperor Fedor Emelianenko takes on Ryan Bader in the finals of Bellator Heavyweight Grand Prix. Plus, pro wrestling superstar Jake Hager makes his long-awaited MMA debut.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Mohegan Sun Arena as two giants collide in the Bellator cage when all American Matt Mitrione takes on Russian knock-out artist Sergei Kharitonov in the Heavyweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena with a Quarter Final bout in the Welterweight World Gran Prix as undefeated Michael Page takes on Paul Daley. In the Co-Main Event, Mirko Cro Cop makes his Bellator MMA debut against Roy Nelson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Emmanuel Sanchez returns to the cage after his hard-fought run toward the title vs a featherweight rematch Georgi Karakhanyan.

programme.title: Bellator 219: Awad vs Girtz
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Temecula, California with a lightweight clash between Brandon Girtz and Saad Awad that promises fireworks. Also, former welterweight champ Andrey Koreshkov, and former featherweight champ Daniel Straus makes his long-awaited return.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Joes to kick off the Welterweight Grand Prix as Rory MacDonald defeats his Welterweight belt against the veteran Jon Fitch. In the co-main event, Flyweight Champ Ilima Lei Macfarlane faces off against Veta Arteaga.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Douglas Lima takes on Michael 'Venom' Page in the Semi-Final round of the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Main Event, Featherweight Champion Patricio Pitbull moves up to challenge Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Madison Square Garden as Welterweight Champ Rory MacDonald defends his belt against Neiman Gracie in the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Co-Main Event MMA legends Lyoto Machida and Chael Sonnen square off in the Bellator cage.

programme.title: Bellator 224: Budd vs Rubin
programme.desc: The summer heats up when Bellator MMA Featherweight World Champion Julia Budd returns to the cage off 10 straight wins. Can her challenger the undefeated Olga “Big Bad” Rubin ice out Julia’s hot streak? Also, rising star Juliana Velasquez in action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with a stacked card as the Featherweight Grand Prix kicks off with four of the opening round bouts. Then in the Main Event, Ryan Bader defends his Heavyweight belt against MMA legend Chieck Kongo

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Nikki & Paige say mom Leigh is an alcoholic who has "gone missing" at least 40 times, abandoned them as teens in a foreclosed home without electricity or running water & is drunk around her grandchildren. Will Leigh listen and take Dr. Phil's help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shemida says she has been diagnosed with more than 70 medical and mental health conditions and prescribed more than 80 medications over a 10-year span. Her sister, Dana, believes Shemida fabricates her issues for attention. Is Shemida really sick? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie insists her teen daughter's behavior is the root cause of her family's dysfunction, not Jonah, her drug & alcohol-addicted husband. Dr. Phil presents Cassie with a difficult choice: pick your children or pick your husband. What will Cassie decide?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents are bombarded with the dangers kids can fall prey: molesters, cyber-stalkers, drugs & bullies. But how far to go to ensure your child's safety? Where do you draw the line between hovering over your children & giving them enough freedom?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues to piece together this puzzle of Robert and the women he thinks he is dating online. Now, an investigation extends to various locations to track down and verify information Robert says he has received from his “girlfriends.” Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: This 2004 YouTube viral video sent shock waves, racked up millions of views, and stirred online outrage. Texas Judge William Adams is lashing his then 16-year-old daughter with a belt, despite her pleas to stop. Do you think Adam's actions are justified?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues investigating Lois' online relationships. Dr. Phil backs a search to Nigeria to locate Lois' current fiancé, "Paul Shaw." Lois asks Dr. Phil to fly him to the U.S. so they can start their future together. Conclusion Pt. 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Continuing with Danielle & Brandon, who are involved in a custody battle. Accusations involving the Sheriff over a sports drink & CPS sent to a wedding rehearsal dinner--Dr. Phil tells the parents how to create a peaceful environment for their child.Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Misti says her mother, Lisa, is a "raging alcoholic" failing rehab 3 times and was arrested and charged with her third DUI just days before. Lisa says she's not an alcoholic, just a person who likes to drink. Can Dr. Phil give Lisa a reality check?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's hard to believe, but in America alone, there may be as many as 5,000 religious groups preying upon the weak and vulnerable, and all in the name of God. Dr. Phil's guests have warnings for you and your children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: If you dread Valentine's Day and don't have a creative bone in your body, take heart, because Dr. Phil and Robin are here to help the romantically challenged!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Valerie says daughter, Alyssa, 19, is a lazy mom refusing to get a job & falls asleep on the couch, leaving her baby unattended. And actor Antonia Sabato Jr. discusses his campaign for a new law banning medical marijuana in homes with children under 18.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alisha says her son, Kevin, 10, pushed the family to the limit with violent outbursts. At home, knives and lighters are hidden & siblings lock themselves in their rooms at night. Alisha's says the 'future Kevin' may hurt the entire family or end a life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his mission to end the silence on domestic violence. More than 25 percent of battered women remain in a relationship with their abuser. Sonya fears that she is one of those women who stay. Hear her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Thanks to reality TV, Dr. Phil says teen moms have been celebrated, but are they accurately portraying young motherhood? What is best for pregnant Emily, 16, & her unborn child? Emily gets a wake-up call when given a quiz on costs of caring for an infant.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's Drew's birthday and we're celebrating all show long with some special surprises for her! "You" star Penn Badgley is surprising Drew with a special birthday present and telling her all about the new season of his hit show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, in an all-new Cookbook Club Molly Yeh joins Drew in the kitchen to whip up a yummy and comforting dish from her new cookbook, "Home is Where the Eggs Are.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, in an all-new Drew Crime, meet 68-year-old Fred and his pet cat Bandit who prevented a home invasion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Legendary actress Whoopi Goldbergis here! Actor and co-host of the podcast "Las Culturistas," Matt Rogers is serving up the news sunny-side up with Drew andRossMathews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Hillary Rodham Clinton and her daughter Chelsea Clinton, who share what it was like going on adventures for new docuseries, "Gutsy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Preppy Kitchen: Recipes for Seasonal Dishes and Simple Pleasures" cookbook author John Kanell joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for Drew's News: Food Edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering everything from the new freemium trend in dating apps to the grinch getting a horror makeover this Christmas to the great 1860 painting cellphone debate.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie is serving the news sunny-side up with Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk and dishing on her new series "Princess Power." Aubrey Plaza stops by to chat about the follow-up to "The Return of the Christmas Witch.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder Drew has a big surprise in store for Deloris "NuNu" and Patrick "PopPop" Hogan who run a safe and reliable 24-hour daycare to help the parents in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the one thing Drake regrets about his rap career and how long experts say it takes to decide if you're attracted to someone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kerry Washington stars in an all-new comedy show, 'UnPrisoned' by creator Tracy McMillan, and they're joining Drew to dish all about the new series.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity interior designer Mikel Welch joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to tackle the latest design headlines including gnome mania, interior designers doubling as marriage counselors, the Biophilic design trend and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's old friend, the widow Adaline Ashley, comes to Beverly Hills, and Granny sets to playing matchmaker for her and Jed. Mrs. Drysdale and her snooty friends are misled to believe Adaline is a socialite jet-setter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is worried about Miss Jane's spinsterhood and convinces Jethro to ask her to marry him. Granny assures him that she will decline the proposal, but Hathaway accepts, leading to panic in the Clampett household.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is on the warpath concerning the chaos caused by Ellie's critters and declares either they go or she does. Mr. Drysdale is equally irritated by the expense of his wife's poodle. Jed tries to find a solution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Jethro believe they have psychic abilities, but Granny's predictions stop coming true. With her reputation on the line, she picks a stock for Mr. Drysdale that could cost him a small fortune.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Heading to England, Jethro smuggles Ellie's turkey buzzard on the plane upsetting Mr. Drysdale and a fellow passenger. After landing, they try to meet with the Queen to give her their 80 million dollars. Their butler Faversham tries to clear things up.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts return from London, Granny gets a letter from Hooterville asking her to help with Betty Jo Elliot's baby.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: While Granny is away in Hooterville, Mr. Drysdale hires a gorgeous Italian cook who speaks no English.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the Italian chef compete to see who will cook for the family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts spend Thanksgiving in Hooterville.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale casts Dash Riprock as Homer Noodleman, a potential new lover for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants a new identity with the replacement of their old truck with a modern hot rod. Granny wants to stay with the old truck. To prove how good the old truck is, Granny races Jethro in his hot rod.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts prepare to go to Hooterville for Christmas.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale follows the Clampetts and Miss Jane to Hooterville where they are spending Christmas. He takes Ellie's bear Fairchild with him and gets himself thrown in jail in a little town. Sam Drucker shows up to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is sick, and Dr. Granny springs into action with a chimp as a nurse. But Ellie's bear Fairchild has taken a liking to granny's flu remedy. During this, Mrs. Drysdale tries to impress society Mrs. Van Ransonhoff.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is evicted because his 50 cent allowance won't cover the rent. The other Clampetts take over the space with Granny will cut hair or pull teeth. Jed will sharpen tools and whittle something. Ellie is the pretty receptionist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the Clampetts established in business in Jethro's vacated office space, a building inspector visits to find out about their business operations on the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale hires a troubleshooter for the bank. His main mission is to get the Clampetts to close their business operating out of the 5th floor.

programme.title: Harlem Nights
programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy stars as mild-mannered Norbit, who gets a second chance at love with his childhood sweetheart, Kate. However, obstacles may make this romance slightly more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Vampire in Brooklyn
programme.desc: As the vampire Maximillian, the popular star is the most diabolical, dashing and definitely undead dude in the ‘hood’.

programme.title: Harlem Nights
programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: What's the Worst That Could Happen?
programme.desc: Kevin is a thief who breaks into Max Fairbanks' unoccupied mansion. Kevin finds himself face to face with Max. And just as the cops arrest Kevin, Max claims Kevin's ring as his own.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: Arguably the most outrageous Christmas tale ever told, Billy Bob Thornton is a thieving Santa who doesn't care if you've been naughty or nice. Hot on his trail: a security guard, a sexy bartender, and the one kid who's convinced he's the real deal.

programme.title: The Original Kings of Comedy
programme.desc: February 26 and 27, 2000, the Original Kings of Comedy play Charlotte, NC. The themes are Blacks and Whites, men and women, old-school and hip-hop.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: With a little help from Myles and a visit from Grandma Mitchell, Moesha moves back home and returns to Crenshaw High.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Dee finds a joint in the couch while cleaning the house. Frank and Dee assume and accuse Mo, but Moesha is shocked when she catches Myles smoking.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha is now officially allowed to date because she is turning sixteen, although Frank remains extremely reluctant.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: After agreeing to date Tim's sister, Malcolm must then find a way to break up.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie finds a gangster's hidden cash hidden inside Malcolm's new car.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: When Malcolm falls for a spiritual guru and Eddie gets a new job offer, they agree to sell the business and move on.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: An aspiring radio sports announcer, Malcolm, and his talkative, would-be tow truck driver roommate, Eddie, attend a get-rich-quick seminar in hopes of winning a much-needed TV.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie needs another job to get his prized tow truck repaired.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: A chance to fill in on an all-night music show has Malcolm exhausted.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Malcolm and Eddie use their lottery winnings to buy their building from Kelly.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie arranges for the Artist Formerly Known as Prince to appear at Kelly's re-opening party.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie is determined to keep Malcolm away from his younger sister.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) is assigned to train Angela (TISHA CAMPBELL), a beautiful new sanitation worker, no one believes his story that she's trying to seduce him every minute they're alone.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When Andrew's (CARL GORDON) lover dies after a passionate evening, he's afraid his wife has cursed him from beyond the grave. So when Roc and Eleanor introduce him to an attractive nurse, Helen (MARGARET AVERY), Andrew refuses to get involved.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When a gang of drug dealers move into a nearby house, Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) and Eleanor (ELLA JOYCE) try to organize their neighbors into a non-violent protest movement to scare them away.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Joey (ROCKY CARROLL) wins The Fly Guys, a rock 'n' roll group, as payment on a bet. Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) becomes the group's new manager.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Joey (ROCKY CARROLL) learns a harsh lesson about surviving in the world of show business when he's hired as a trumpet player for the famous Les McCann Band.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Eleanor's (ELLA JOYCE) birthday party is ruined when Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) loses all patience with Joey's (ROCKY CARROLL) irresponsibility and evicts him.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When Joey (ROCKY CARROLL) is given free use of his friend's luxury car, Eleanor (ELLA JOYCE) insists that Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) withdraw some of their savings from the bank so they can buy a car of their own.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Feeling confident in her relationship with Roc, Eleanor invites Roc's ex, Janet, to dinner, but when Janet reveals that she turned down Roc's marriage proposal three months before he married Eleanor, things starts to get very interesting.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When Joey Emerson hires his brother Roc to paint his friend's luxury condominium, Roc gets arrested for being a black man in the wrong place at the wrong time.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Following the advice of his son Lamont, Fred donates a collection of rare jazz albums to a music library in order to get a tax write-off, but he wants them back when he finds they are valued at $500.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont buys Fred a pool table for a birthday gift and Fred's buddies turn the Sanford home into a pool hall. With the pool table in, the junk business is out and so is Donna, Fred's fiancée.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Always trying to make a buck, Fred talks Lamont into letting Grady become a 'paying' boarder in their home. But it looks like Fred is the one paying the price.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Disgusted at Aunt Esther's endless rehashing of a friend's funeral, Fred and his cronies, Grady, Leroy and Skillet and Bubba, plan a cheer-up party. The party, with the help of 'left-out' Lamont, gets underway early and ends with a big surprise.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: A question arises as to whether Fred is really Lamont's father. Big Money Grip tells Grady that he is Lamont's father. Grady breaks the news to Fred and Fred consults his deceased wife's sister Esther.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Van defends himself and his artwork against a few unhappy clients causing legal trouble for Ryan. While Don and Ashley view houses at the top of their non-existent budget, a familiar face returns for a second chance at life and love at 9MAG.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: The Crown and Toga loses business to a Germanian pub and tries to steal their recipe for beer.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: The boys set off on a wine-buying trip to Tuscany, but when their cart has a collision on the road they are forced to pull into a nearby village.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Marcus offers to tutor Gloria's teenage son Barney, while Grumio is mistaken for a schoolboy and soon finds himself recruited into the preteen boxing team.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: It's a fresh start for Will McKenzie as he joins his new sixth-form college.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon is about to sit his first driving test and Will, Jay and Neil are excited by the new possibilities that having a car will bring.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The boys call Jay's bluff and agree to go to the Camber Sands meeting of the Caravan Club to see if it really is 'like a massive orgy'.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: It's the end of term and Will has been voted the chairman of the Christmas prom committee. Okay, he was the only person who wanted the job, but he's still taking it seriously.

programme.title: Mr. Bean: Merry Christmas Mr. Bean
programme.desc: It is Christmas time and an excited Mr. Bean creates his usual havoc across the festive season. He brings new meaning to “dressing” the TURKEY, whilst his girlfriend, Irma, looks forward to a very special Christmas present……

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean treats himself to a weekend in a HOTEL. Unfortunately, he feels his room lacks certain essential amenities. In his own ingenious way, he solves that problem only to be faced with another when he locks himself out of his room.

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is delighted to have found his way to the FUNFAIR but less than thrilled to have inadvertently landed himself with minding a baby. He now has the quandary of keeping the baby safe without in any way compromising his own fun at the fair.

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loses midnight on NEW YEAR’S EVE but finds a bargain at the SALES next day. He devises a most unusual method of transporting his shopping home and creates DECORATING havoc by doing-it-himself!

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean gets a bit charged up at the science demonstration and finds the art class disgraceful. Someone runs off with his trousers after a judo class and in the car park, Mr. Bean’s car comes under a bit of pressure.

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loses his trousers again, in the LAUNDERETTE this time! He has his first round of CRAZY GOLF in the afternoon, but Mr. Bean decides what you need to be any good at the game is a good atlas, a compass and plenty of bus money.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Viejos tiempos
programme.desc: Cuando el primer socio de Frank anuncia sus planes de publicar un libro lleno de historias de sus primeros días en la policía, a Frank le preocupa que sus historias personales se hagan públicas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A sangre fría
programme.desc: Cuando un teniente de la policía de Nueva York, recientemente retirado y bien considerado, es acusado de disparar a un grupo de posibles asaltantes en el metro y posteriormente desaparece, Frank debe enfrentar las consecuencias.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: París
programme.desc: Cuando la testigo estrella del gobierno en un caso de malversación es objetivo de un asesino, depende del equipo ayudarla a llegar a casa con vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Farsa
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra en una carrera contrarreloj cuando un grupo terrorista amenaza con detonar una bomba radioactiva en la zona de Washington.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Navaja
programme.desc: Cuando un marine es encontrado muerto, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo se dirigen a la carretera para detener una operación ilegal de camiones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las hijas de Bruce Morrison, una escritor cuya esposa desapareció misteriosamente el año pasado, desaparecen en el aniversario de la desaparición de su madre, el BAU debe estudiar a Morrison como un posible sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A sangre fría
programme.desc: Cuando un teniente de la policía de Nueva York, recientemente retirado y bien considerado, es acusado de disparar a un grupo de posibles asaltantes en el metro y posteriormente desaparece, Frank debe enfrentar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El camino al infierno
programme.desc: Danny debe determinar quién asesinó a un hombre cuando varias mujeres que trabajaron para él se atribuyen el mérito.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Erin se siente abrumada por la culpa después de que un hombre al que liberó es acusado de matar a un policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Island life takes its toll on the seven remaining rednecks, especially the "all-girl alliance" which begins to crack under the strain of petty jealousies.

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Brian Boucher is passionate about three things: trucking, family, and racing. Brian's away from his wife and two kids for months at a time so the boys transform Brian's beat-down Volvo into a well-oiled machine fit for any racing fan!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Josh Mullen is a musician who's doing everything he can to make it in the music business. As his band plays gigs all over the Midwest, the boys turn Josh's beat-down band van into a bodacious 1950s beach woody that'll be sure to turn heads on the road.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Lance Burk is the young owner of a feed delivery business and he really enjoys being his own boss. For the first time ever, the boys team up with Hollywood to transform Lance's old Kenworth into the Iron Man truck influenced by the blockbuster film.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Driving a truck is the only career David Goad has ever wanted and he considers it his job to help keep America's economy rolling. David's kids contact the boys and get them to turn David's worn-out Kenworth into a tribute to America's Old West.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jay Whiteford's success in the trucking business is due to hard work and family support. Now, twenty-five years later, Jay's truck is on its last legs so the boys work to overhaul Jay's old Freightliner into a rolling tribute to Jay's career roots.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Derek Lepke has turned his passion for the outdoors into three very successful careers which operate out of his pickup truck. It's wearing down from overuse so the boys transform Derek's Ford F250 into a leopard-printed safari truck from down under!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Rick Julian is the proud owner of a wrecking business and a volunteer with his local fire and police departments. The boys help give thanks to Rick by turning his beat-up Freightliner flatbed into a tribute to rescue vehicles.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: All Wade Hill really wants is a dependable truck he can be proud of so he can spend more time with his family. The boys turn Wade's run-down Pete 359 into a rolling tribute to Wade's favorite hobby: snowmobiling.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: David Tenpenny gave up his truck driving career in order to teach automotive mechanics in a small Kansas town, but driving never left his heart. David's class calls up the boys, who transform David's truck into a rolling educational workshop.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Gary The Honey Man Grose loves two things: honey making and educating people about honey making. Gary depends on his truck to haul everything from Honey jars to honeybees so they turn Gary's old flatbed Hino into the ultimate honey-dripping hive.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Matt Kolb is a proud grandfather and 32 year veteran of the road. Known as a kid at heart, Matt's always looking for a good time. But the bad economy and poor shape of his truck have this former wild child feeling down.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jeff White was a proud truck driver with 17 years of experience under his belt. But his career came to a stop when his daughter Amanda suffered severe injuries in a car accident.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck

programme.title: Trick My Truck

programme.title: Trick My Truck

programme.title: Trick My Truck

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: A serial murderer leaves his victims in coded t-shirts. The team struggles to decode his mythological clues and put their main suspect behind bars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay explore the worlds of goth and glam when a young girl that belongs to the underground “suicide girls” cult is found dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a paintball player is found shot to death, Flack realizes that a dirty cop under his supervision could be to blame.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a night of heavy partying two underage girls make the reckless decision to drive home. In route, the girls get into an accident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Flack investigate the death of a parachute professional whose chute was pelted with dead pigeons causing him to plummet to the ground.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Hawkes is framed for shooting a bartender and then later sent to prison, the team takes to the street to set their investigator free.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella work with a deaf family to find their daughter’s killer. The team investigates the murder of a young skating sensation.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La electrocución de un joven en el tercer riel del metro conduce al mundo de un deporte extremo donde correr riesgos es parte del juego.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Los dueños de perros competidores se convierten en los principales sospechosos de una investigación de asesinato cuando el detective Mac Taylor examina la muerte de un adiestrador de perros.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Tanglewood (S1 Ep13)
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un chico suburbano encontrado muerto a golpes en Van Cortlandt Park lleva al equipo de CSI a Tanglewood, hogar de un grupo de aspirantes a gánsters.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera descubren el cuerpo de un adolescente metido en una caja de 60 x 60 x 60 cm enterrada en la arena en Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el robo de un camión, los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera descubren un cuerpo aplastado bajo diez toneladas de acero.

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un festejo por la publicación de un informe sobre corrupción policial termina en un derramamiento de sangre, cuando suenan disparos en el piso 65 de un rascacielos de Midtown.

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Yanni reclama su herencia para unirse a las Monjas del Monte, una congregación dedicada a cultivar cannabis. Rebeca sabe que su hermana es maltratada por su esposo, pero no lo quiere reconocer.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Luisa se contagió de Hepatitis C porque le echó leche materna de Diana a su café. Por otro lado, Rebeca tuvo un accidente porque se distrajo al ver una valla con su cuerpo desnudo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Los padres de Scarlett se han casado y divorciado durante cincuenta años. Además, Irene fue despedida porque se burló de los mexicanos y la fe que tienen en la Virgen de Guadalupe.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Mariana cuida a la hija de Brenda y al cambiarla descubre que la niña tiene muchos moretones en el cuerpo. Marisol paga condenas ajenas a cambio de dinero, así construyó un capital importante.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Norma casó a su hijo con una cubana para obtener los papeles, pero ellos se gustan. En otro caso, Ángel fue novio de Alonso en la cárcel y aunque pensaban casarse, habí­a una mujer entre ellos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Néstor se casó con la exesposa de su amigo Junior y se hizo cargo de su hija, pero ahora la mujer murió. Además, Andrés es un blogger que fomenta un juego en Internet muy peligroso.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rafael perdió una pierna defendiendo a su suegra Sonia, ella le compró una prótesis y ahora se la quita. Juan es torero y le enseña a sus hijos esta peligrosa profesión, su esposa se opone.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Omary y Stefany trabajan como sexoservidoras en Colombia, sus colegas no las quieren por lo que cobran. La madre de Joel lo dejó solo con su violento padre, el señor murió y ella ha regresado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Una joven fue secuestrada y su familia pagó con lo que tenían para lograr su liberación. Harold, Fernando y Omar trabajaban en la misma barbería, pero una broma pesada los arruinó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Lili es despedida de su trabajo como mesera porque ha tenido una erección en horario laboral. Además, un pastor rompe el acuerdo de mantener al hijo de Mónica porque ella fue infiel.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Juana padece la enfermedad de Cupido, siente una gran felicidad, ganas de vivir, tener sexo y salir con jóvenes. Por otro lado, Claudia publicó en internet el acoso sexual de su jefe.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Verónica tiene una relación con el novio de su madre y cuando se entera la manda a violar. Además, Jaqueline y Pablo tienen una relación laboral online, pero se vuelve sexual.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Gonzalo está cansado de su mujer y tomó la decisión de asaltar un banco para ir a prisión. Por otro lado, Ángela le vendió una casa al esposo de Natalia, pero el arreglo fue confuso.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Richard y Janet tiene una condición física en el rostro que afecta su salud. También, Leonardo incineró los cuerpos de sus padres para fundirlos en una vajilla.

programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Freddy stretches himself to be there for both Frasier, who's coping with Martin's death by throwing a lavish party, and Eve, who's hiding out at home dealing with her own loss.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Following Martin's death, Frasier returns to Boston for a college lecture and to check in on his son, Freddy—whom he quickly suspects is keeping a secret from him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier hopes to make up for lost time with Freddy, but a disagreement over where to put a small Red Sox souvenir quickly escalates into a battle of wills between father and son.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier begins a new career at the university, determined to be taken seriously as an academic—but finds that a nearly twenty year stint as a daytime talk show host is not easy to escape.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Freddy aims to show his father that he's not "just a firefighter," but rather part of a noble and fulfilling cause–then picks the worst possible day to invite Frasier to the firehouse.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier joins Alan and Olivia as they seek membership in the university's prestigious "Founders' Society." Meanwhile, David digs into Freddy's personal life for a surprising reason.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier joins Alan and Olivia as they seek membership in the university's prestigious "Founders' Society." Meanwhile, David digs into Freddy's personal life for a surprising reason.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles gets jealous of an old flame of Daphne's at the dog park; Frasier teaches Lana about honesty in selling a problematic piece of real estate and Martin secretly attends the parole hearing of the man who shot him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Troubled by his recent relationship woes, Frasier goes to the country for peace and quiet, but ends up facing the ghosts of failed relationships past.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne is tortured by pangs of jealousy when she learns one of Niles's patients is in love with him. Frasier and Martin go to extreme lengths to catch a cricket hiding in the apartment.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin goes back to work as a security guard, and reflects on his last day as a cop, when he was shot.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's psychological party game brings unpleasant revelations at his Halloween party. Niles dresses as Martin and gets drunk on beer. The children in the apartment building believe that Frasier eats kids' brains.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: On their 8th anniversary of living together, Frasier accidentally destroys Martin's recliner. Niles discovers Daphne has no talent for music.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier becomes obsessed with replacing a missing tape in his collection of all 2,000 of his shows.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin gets criticized at work and decides to let it go, however, Frasier and Niles can't. They decide to do some interfering which leads to a lengthy confinement in a storage room.

programme.desc: Miguel Carrasco se devuelve a su ciudad natal y mata a Juan Huitron, después de que éste lo acusara de homicida. Miguel rechaza huir a pesar de que los hermanos del difunto buscan revancha.

programme.title: Locura Musical
programme.desc: Un musical en tono de comedia, narrando las peripecias que realizan los encargados de un cabaret de élite en la ciudad de México para poder mantener el éxito alcanzado hasta entonces.

programme.title: Música y Dinero
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de empleados amenaza con hacer huelga, el jefe le pide a un amigo cantante que ha recibido una herencia que lo ayude con su problema.

programme.title: Los tres bohemios
programme.desc: Tres jóvenes cantantes reciben ayuda de la dueña de un restaurante y estos hacen famoso al local con su música.

programme.title: Pies de Gato
programme.desc: Luis Aguilar encabeza el elenco en esta historia de una banda de bandidos alegres cuyas hazañas son más divertidas que despreciables. Continuación de "Los bandidos de Río Frío" (1954).

programme.title: Los Galleros de Jalisco
programme.desc: Miguel Carrasco se devuelve a su ciudad natal y mata a Juan Huitron, después de que éste lo acusara de homicida. Miguel rechaza huir a pesar de que los hermanos del difunto buscan revancha.

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
