programme.title: Cesar Chavez
programme.desc: Michael Peña interpreta a César Chávez, que inspiró a millones de estadounidenses a luchar por la justicia social. Su viaje triunfal es un testimonio del poder de un individuo para cambiar el mundo.

programme.title: Nada como la familia
programme.desc: Los dispersos miembros de la familia Rodríguez se reúnen en la casa de sus padres para enfrentar lo que podría ser su última Navidad juntos en esta conmovedora comedia navideña.

programme.title: Desde Mexico con amor
programme.desc: Un entrenador fracasado toma a un joven boxeador autodestructivo (Kuno Becker) bajo su ala.

programme.title: Cesar Chavez
programme.desc: Michael Peña interpreta a César Chávez, que inspiró a millones de estadounidenses a luchar por la justicia social. Su viaje triunfal es un testimonio del poder de un individuo para cambiar el mundo.

programme.title: La hija del general
programme.desc: Existe la forma correcta, la forma equivocada y la forma del ejército. Pero bajo ninguna circunstancia, el investigador militar Paul Brenner ayudará a los oficiales de Fort MacCallum a encubrir el motivo de la muerte de una hermosa oficial.

programme.title: Leones por corderos
programme.desc: Tres historias interrelacionadas: un profesor intenta inspirar a uno de sus alumnos, dos de sus antiguos alumnos se encuentran atrapados en Afganistán, y un senador en Washington tiene una nueva estrategia de guerra.

programme.title: Padre soltero
programme.desc: Ben Affleck, Jennifer López y George Carlin protagonizan esta comedia irresistible. Un relato sincero sobre un hombre que de repente es un padre soltero, aprendiendo que debe aceptar su identidad y reconocer lo que lo hace feliz.

programme.title: El príncipe y yo
programme.desc: Una fantástica historia de amor sobre una estudiante de medicina que se enamora de un príncipe danés que se negó a seguir las tradiciones de sus padres y vino a EE.UU. a rebelarse.

programme.title: Ella espera un bebé
programme.desc: Jake y Kristi eran dos jóvenes solteros locos y enamorados. Pero un año después, se convirtieron en dos adultos locos y casados atravesando una fase de transición.

programme.title: Bride & Prejudice
programme.desc: Basada en la novela de Jane Austen, Pride and Prejudice, en un remolino musical, la chispa se encienda (y las culturas chocan) entre una belleza de pueblo y un estadounidense rico. Una aclamada pieza del director Gurinder Chadha.

programme.title: Canela

programme.desc: Un veterano de guerra paranoico y desquiciado que ve insectos por todas partes se refugia con una mujer solitaria en una espeluznante habitación de un motel de Oklahoma.

programme.desc: Un agente del FBI que investiga la muerte de un asesino serial sigue la pista de un justiciero que dedica su vida a perseguir asesinos seriales.

programme.title: Una extraña pareja, otra vez

programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: Un sociópata se lía a cometer crímenes a diestro y siniestro en Miami y se enrolla con una prostituta confiada, mientras da esquinazo a un policía algo torpe.

programme.desc: Frank Drebin (Leslie Nielsen) adora el misterio. ¿Por qué estamos aquí? ¿Hay vida después del sexo? Sí, aborda los grandes temas, y el más grande es detener a Quentin Hapsburg (Robert Goulet) en su plan para destruir el medio ambiente.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final
programme.desc: La noche de los Óscar(r). ¿Puede alguien echar ese zoquete? ¡Esperen! No es un zoquete cualquiera, es el Tte. Frank Drebin. ¡Y se coló para detener un atentado terrorista!

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins
programme.desc: Basada en la increíble historia real, Meryl Streep nos entrega una actuación cómica y conmovedora, como una mujer de sociedad de Nueva York que sueña con convertirse en una gran cantante de ópera, a pesar de tener una voz cómicamente espantosa.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: El Dorado

programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: Marty
programme.desc: Ernest Borgnine won a Best Actor Oscar for his role as a Bronx butcher who gives up on love, until he meets an equally lonely school teacher in this charming story that garnered a total of four Oscars including Best Picture.

programme.desc: This Oscar®-nominated film has the legendary Cary Grant as a government attorney who can't seem to shake his bad fortune. Living on a houseboat, widowed and left with three unruly kids, he hires Sophia Loren as a governess.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: Charlie is out of jail and on the make with a plan for the heist of the century. Aided by top criminal mastermind Mr Bridger, Charlie sets off with a team of villains and to lift $4,000,000 from under the noses of the Turin Polizei.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker

programme.desc: While staying with the Douglases, Arnold the Pig witnesses a bank robbery when he goes with the Douglases on an errand in Pixley. When Lisa asks him to describe the two robbers, Arnold, reliving the moment, loses his voice from fear.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to the annual Carpenter's Ball because he thinks the attendees are too eccentric for his liking. But Lisa has her own motives to attend. She is trying to get a romance sparked between two local singles.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Aloha! The Douglases vacation in Hawaii. But the daughter of the hotel manager needs to keep secret that she double booked the honeymoon suite. The 'sweet' surprise? While Lisa and Oliver settle in, they are unaware that the other room is occupied.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's heirloom watch is broken so he tries to find his ex-secretary Carol's address to ask her the name of the jeweler who fixed it last time. Carol is now working and living in Los Angeles, and we get a glimpse into her new life.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver decides to attend night school and enrolls in a farming class, Lisa does the same, taking psychology. Before long, many of the residents of Hooterville are lining up for appointments with the eminent Dr. Lisa.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: In this classic series' premiere episode, New York City attorney Oliver Wendell Douglas (Eddie Albert) satisfies his desire for the simple life by buying a farm, much to the chagrin of his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor). John Charles Daly narrates the tale!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) brings his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor), to their new home, a ramshackle farm near Hooterville, just outside of Pixley, where she gets to meet the town's oddball residents. Bea Benaderet, Edgar Buchanan and Frank Cady guest star!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) is ready to get farming, but Lisa (Eva Gabor) puts her foot down and says she will leave unless they can hire a decorator to fix the house! Meanwhile, Kate Bradley (Bea Benaderet) teaches Lisa how to make hotcakes.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Is the Honeymoon period over already? The rumor mill has it that Lisa (Eva Gabor) has packed up and left Oliver (Eddie Albert). Actually, she went back to New York to close up their penthouse apartment. And Mr. Haney is up to his old tricks!

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A week in New York City transforms Betty Jo from a country girl into a svelte sophisticate.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe's, arch-enemy of the Hooterville Cannonball, returns to Hooterville Valley in adject disgrace and poverty.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: One of Kate's old flames pays a visit,but his efforts to rekindle their romance are thwarted by his dominating sister.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe becomes the new postmaster of Hooterville and moves the post office to the Shady Rest hotel.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Joe enters a contest sponsored by Gibney's Old English Tomato Sauce and wins first prize-an English butler.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate battles rural postmasters to recover an ill-advised letter from the mails.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Tomboy Betty Jo goes looking for a husband on the premise that fate has singles her out to become the next bride in the community.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: High- schooler Betty Jo poses as a college coed to gain the interest of a handsome college boy.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo takes pity on the only boy in her home economics class and induces her mother to help him win a passing grade.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: All the Bradley's expect to be a big winner in the contests they enter at the county-fair until Uncle Joe gives them a hand.

programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carter's mission.

programme.desc: When Gomer's cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomer's uniforms and then wanders the base, everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carter's sister. Carter is determined to break them up.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately. Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer won't rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty goes under hypnosis so she can remember the events that led up to a car accident that killed her friend and caused her to lose her memory-and realizes it was no accident.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: In the course of investigating the death of a film editor, Barnaby and J.R. uncover a movie pirating operation that could potentially cost the studio millions in lost revenue.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty investigates an academy for girls where a series of accidents have injured instructors and students alike. What she finds is a vicious group of girls who dominate the school through fear and intimidation tactics.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Danny Williams goes undercover as a sailor to flush out a drug ring operating from a vessel in the U.S. Seventh Fleet.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett seeks a killer whose targets have been wives of army men who have come to Hawaii to meet their husbands on furlough.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett is puzzled when a computer programmed to help solve the slaying of an underworld figure's business associate indicates that the culprit is one of McGarrett's own people — Duke.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Ricardo Montalban plays Alex Pareno, a wealthy auto-racing enthusiast whose mechanic is slain on the eve of Hawaii's most important road race.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A series of deaths of well-to-do businessmen puts the Hawaii Five-O unit into the investigation of a lucrative blackmail operation.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Danny is involved in the shooting of a teenager following a fellow police officer's death; guests John Rubinstein, Louise Latham.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A high school student is the only witness to the brutal rape of his teacher, but his overprotective father refuses to allow him to get involved. He wants to help catch the man that assaulted his teacher, but is he brave enough to disobey his father?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner goes to Los Angeles to take custody of a suspected arsonist and bring him back to Sparta, but the arsonist disappears and is later found murdered. A pretty insurance fraud investigator helps Bubba uncover the truth behind the murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Vic Glendon, the ex-husband of Sparta councilperson Harriet DeLong, has been charged with murder and is facing a death sentence. Harriet's teenage son, Eugene, is most affected by the trial and the conflict he feels towards his criminal father.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A double murder at a local roadhouse is the focus of the Sparta police, and a young witness is reluctant to come forward. Now that they are parents, Althea Tibbs worries about Virgil’s safety on the police force and asks him to consider law school.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: An old flame of Gillespie’s reappears in Sparta to ask him for some professional help in assuring that her land is willed directly to her daughter, the product of the affair that she and Gillespie had twenty years ago. Stella Stevens guest stars.

programme.desc: Reno and several innocent travelers are terrorized at a lonely desert cafe by four escaped convicts.

programme.title: Renegade

programme.desc: Reno befriends a teenage girl as they both pursue a wanted killer and his gang of bank robbers.

programme.desc: Kimble returns home and visits his sister Donna right under the nose of Gerard.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: John McIntire guest stars as a migrant farm worker with whom Richard Kimble is working when he is tracked down and captured by Lt. Gerard.

programme.title: The Fugitive

programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Keisha knows that Desmond fathered her baby, but he wants her out of his life! Then, 2 desperate moms confront the man who fathered their 3 kids!

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: One man…four DNA results…is Darren the father? Crystal and Myrissa both have 2-year old kids and claim that Darren's the dad. Later, mothers and grandmothers want to get to the truth about the paternity questions haunting their family.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 2 Women. 3 Babies. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Maury will reveal the results of paternity tests on today’s MAURY. Will Maury say “You ARE the father!” and are those the very words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After a night of passion with her neighbor, Lashanda claims that Avery is the father, but his girlfriend isn't having it! Plus, Nikki needs to prove that she has never cheated on Daniel or her relationship with her entire family will be on the line!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Has Antonio been cheating on Chasity since their wedding day? Is Mike sleeping with his wife Lisa’s mother? Jackie swears Danny is cheating and he swears she is…Maury’s got all of the results!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Linda is cheating on her boyfriend EJ with his dad Earnest! Yolanda wants Eddie to help take care of their child, but can she handle the results of the DNA test? Later, 2 teens get the DNA test that might change their lives forever!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Could La’Nell be the grandmother of her sister-in-law Savanna’s baby if she slept with her teen son James? Plus, Sholonda told her husband that he might not be their daughter’s father, but after 17 DNA tests, they’re back today!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With My Daughter's Girlfriend

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1971, John List dejó una nota con los cuerpos de su madre, esposa y tres hijos en el salón de baile de su mansión antes de desaparecer por completo. Los detectives deben resolver el caso, a pesar de tener solo una fotografía desactualizada de List.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Condena por Huella de Palma de Mano
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vida cambia después de 20 años de haber transcurrido un crimen sin resolver, y lo mismo ocurre con la medicina forense. Hoy en día, un microscopio de alto poder y el perfil de ADN, revelan una pista que nadie había visto antes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesinato en el menú
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de cocina de un restaurante histórico de Filadelfia fue encontrado muerto, los investigadores entrevistaron a los sospechosos habituales: familiares, amigos y compañeros de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a un popular profesor de gimnasia muerto por lo que parece ser una herida de bala accidental, su familia se pone sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, Kathy Lorick fue asesinada en una pista de carreras en Concord, California, en pleno día, mientras hablaba con su esposo por su teléfono móvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog School
programme.desc: Zeus, the Siberian Husky, is on a week-long sleepover at Day Care because his owners have gone on holiday. He’s finding the extended stay a bit tough and each day at the usual time, he waits at the gate for his owners to collect him.

programme.title: Animal Attractions

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players are placed into a large plexiglas coffin with several thousand snakes. Eight glass torch-goblets are placed on stone pillars of varying heights. Contestants will bob in a tank filled with cow eyes to recover pig hearts.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: For this Psycho Arc couples stunt, a hearse will be specially fabricated with a standing platform replacing the rear bumper. One contestant will be handcuffed to a shower inside a bathroom at the Bates Motel.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two large platforms are hanging below two helicopters. In this pairs stunt, each contestant will be seated in a barber chair. Contestants will each start out straddling the side of a container, at opposite ends, high in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must exit from a speed boat by grabbing onto ladder that is hanging out of a helicopter. The contestant has to transfer mealworms from a Plexiglas container to a scale. Contestants will launch themselves in a car off a 3 foot high ramp.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants support one another while leaning out over each side of a boat. Each contestant will be lying in a vertical position and rotated head over feet. Each contestant will be in a car and on go will back off the flatbed trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hogtied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker. Contestants will be lying on their backs in a 72-foot-long trough on the roof of a building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under individual helicopters. Each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start on the roof of The Mandalay Bay. A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which will need to be picked up off using their mouth. The contestants are allowed to eat up to six cave spiders.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed in a plexiglass cabinet. One person retrieves roaches using only their mouth and transfers it to their partner's mouth, who in turn drops it into another bin. In this stunt, it will be a husband and wife team.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouths. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be riding in the back of a truck driving down a pier. Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top of each of the tables. Contestant must drive their car under a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will pull themselves into the belly of the helicopter. The number of pins left standing represents the number of live beetles that each contestant will have to eat. The contestant has to climb on a rope that is over a hundred feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants enter the water where there is a 30-yard long tunnel. Unhatched duck's embryo boiled 30 minutes and then served. Contestants must ride a bicycle across a 10" wide plank that is suspended between two buildings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will hang from a bar placed outside a 12th story window and drop by a descender line . Each contestant will be asked to eat three sheep's eyes in three minutes. Each contestant is lowered by their feet head first into a water tank.

programme.desc: Loren and Brian plot different courses to prove they're courageous men, until danger unites them.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A dying woman was forced to leave a son behind in the Soviet Union during World War II.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a novelist who's given up. Also, they motivate the man's grandson, who has yet to tap into his literary potential.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers a secret about the past of a woman who runs a home for unwed mothers.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels must help preserve a young boy’s special friendship with a town eccentric

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica must prevent a brilliant young politician from sacrificing her promising career because of a destructive friendship

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a young man falls into a coma after a tragic car accident, the angels must help his distraught family weather the crisis

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk
programme.desc: For many years a mysterious monk with no name (Chow Yun-Fat) has zigzagged the globe to protect an ancient scroll -- a scroll that holds the key to unlimited power. Now the Monk must look for a new scrollkeeper.

programme.title: American Ninja
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff stars as Joe Armstrong, a one-man fighting machine. Serving in the army to avoid prison, Joe finds himself battling the deadly Black Star Order, as well as corrupt military leaders in order to bring down an illegal arms sale.

programme.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
programme.desc: On a remote Caribbean island, Army Ranger Joe Armstrong saves an old friend from the clutches of "The Lion," an evil super-criminal who has kidnapped a local scientist and mass-produced an army of mutant Ninja warriors.

programme.title: American Ninja 3: Blood Hunt
programme.desc: Martial artist David Bradley takes the reins as Sean Davidson in this third installment of the wildly popular American Ninja franchise, teaming up with Steve James to battle a maniacal terrorist in yet another explosive action-packed adventure!

programme.title: American Ninja 4: The Annihilation
programme.desc: The American Ninja burst onto the screen in the fourth round of martial arts Action.

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: The absorbing martial arts film that exposes Ninjutsu, the lethal, little-known "Art of Invisibility"... which includes the use of hypnotism, explosives, and super-human fighting skills.

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: Sho Kosugi ("Enter the Ninja") delivers a heart-pounding display of strength, speed and lethal Ninja know-how in this action-packed thriller that takes us back to the good old days of the Kung Fu extravaganza.

programme.title: Rage of Honor
programme.desc: When his partner is killed during a drug bust, a federal agent throws away his badge and the rule book with it. Arming himself with an array of deadly weaponry including nunchucks and ninja stars, he sets out to settle the score with the bad guys.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Abajo, en Big Easy, el chef Ramsay intenta inyectar algo de vida en un restaurante sureño acosado por una decoración y menús atroces. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a algunos de los restaurantes para ver si siguieron su consejo. Los restaurantes que visita incluyen Mojito, The Junction y Bazzini. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a Lido di Manhattan, Anna Vincenzo's y Le Bistro para ver si los propietarios han implementado sus cambios. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: The Secret Garden" es un romántico restaurante francés que está al borde de la quiebra. El chef Ramsay causa revuelo cuando sugiere cambiar la decoración fea, el menú y la cocina sucia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Lela's es un restaurante exclusivo que desesperadamente necesita más clientela.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Sebastian's prepara comida congelada de un menú complejo y los meseros están más preocupados por las audiciones para sus papeles de actuación que por servir las comidas.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita el Finn McCool's manejado por una familia en Westhampton, Nueva York, y se enfrenta a un detestable jefe de cocina que resulta ser el hijo del propietario.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ubicado en Bellmore, Nueva York, The Mixing Bowl enfrenta una afluencia de competencia y apenas tiene clientes.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay debe trabajar con un chef testarudo y propietarios sin experiencia para realizar algunos cambios y traer de vuelta a los clientes a Seascape.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Fair Lawn, Nueva Jersey, para encontrarse con un personal de meseros indiferentes que lastima al restaurante italiano Campania's.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.desc: Scrappy faces his addiction problems head-on. Joseline makes a surprise purchase. Rasheeda and her mom face off against Kirk. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Boriqua
programme.desc: Joseline surprises Stevie with a gift. Rasheeda makes a decision about Kirk. Scrappy tries to resolve things with Erica before rehab. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Lord Of The Rings
programme.desc: Erica and Momma Dee visit Scrappy. K.Michelle makes a major announcement. Stevie risks it all to get everything he wants from Joseline and Mimi. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Reunion, Part 1
programme.desc: Sparks fly when the ladies reunite. Erica and Scrappy discuss the end of their engagement. Rasheeda confronts Kirk. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Reunion, Part 2
programme.desc: The drama continues when the entire cast reunites. Scrappy squirms in the hot seat between Erica and Shay. K.Michelle also performs. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Stevie and Joseline celebrate the next step in their relationship, while Kirk and Rasheeda take two steps back. Waka Flocka promises to be faithful to Tammy, and Nikko puts Mimi in a compromising position for the whole world to see. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leaked
programme.desc: Scrappy tries to juggle all of the ladies in his life. Karlie imposes ground rules on her new man, Yung Joc. Kirk sets out to prove whether or not he is the father of Rasheeda's baby...and Benzino helps him cover it up. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: The Results Are In
programme.desc: Stevie and Joseline throw a dinner party for Benzino and his new girlfriend. Scrappy and Bambi deal with a new development in their relationship. Kirk receives the results of his DNA test. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Fujiko instigates Lupin and friends to go steal; this time their target is the Jovich Piano installed in a music hall built around it. There is no door large enough in the hall to carry the piano out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the shipment of raw diamonds that arrived at a harbor in Nice; he sneaks into the storage in the middle of the night but Zenigata was on to him. Lupin escapes with the help of Jigen and Goemon, but Fujiko gets captured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #17: Tactics Of Angels
programme.desc: Lupin faces his toughest opponents yet! Four women known as the Bloody Angels are after the strange metallic sphere he stole from Area 51. To get their hands on potential alien technology, they're willing to do anything.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #19: The Elusiveness of the Fog
programme.desc: Lupin's attempt to steal a time machine causes a crazy mishap! Now stuck in ancient Japan, his team and Inspector Zenigata must join forces to get back to their own time. But notorious thief Lupin has enemies everywhere... and everywhen!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #20: Sweet Lost Night
programme.desc: Turns out the Magic Lamp is real, and Lupin's found a way to steal it! But this genie has a price: to grant his wish, she demands half his memories.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 8/21/22: Mark Canha belts a three-run homer in the 7th inning to tie the game, then slugs a two-run go-ahead big fly in the top of the 9th to help the Mets rally for a 10-9 win over the Phillies.

programme.title: All-Century Team
programme.desc: With rare archival footage, exclusive interviews, and compelling stories, the Major League Baseball All-Century Team honors the greatness of these all-time heroes through the awe-filled words of teammates, opponents, and even their own recollections.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/5/12: In what would be Chipper Jones' final game of his career, the Braves took on the Cardinals in the NL Wild Card Game, which was highlighted by a controversial infield fly rule in the 8th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/11/22: Michael Harris II slugs his second homer of the game in the 9th, setting the Braves up for a five-run inning and a hopeful victory. However, the stars align for the Mariners as Julio Rodríguez and Eugenio Suárez stage a walk-off win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/17/22: Amed Rosario collects four RBIs and hits a walk-off single in the bottom of the 15th inning to help the Guardians edge the Twins, 7-6, in the second game of a doubleheader.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera
programme.desc: A giant mutated turtle wakes from eons of slumber and attacks Japan in Gamera: The Giant Monster (1965). The Bots create their own beauty salon and are treated to a visit from Gamera himself.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch an early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital, before watching a movie made of several edited television episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Barugon
programme.desc: The Mads send the crew another Gamera movie. This time, a group of travelers scour the jungle in search of a giant opal. What they find is actually the egg of a lizard-dog creature called Barugon.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Gaos
programme.desc: Gamera is back and this time he is up against Gaos, a bat-monster with the ability to shoot laser beams. Joel and the Bots make an arts and crafts project.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Guiron
programme.desc: It's Gamera Movie #4, including the Gamera Theme Song and a reenactment of an old favorite magic trick.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera vs. Jiger
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch Gamera save the day at Osaka's Expo '70, in GAMERA VS JIGER (1970). Pearl tries to convince Kinga to take a break.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Zigra
programme.desc: The seventh offering from Gamera: the infamous turtle faces off against an alien called Zigra determined on world domination. Joel and the Bots build a scale model of Gamera and make shoebox dioramas.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The first episode of the 1952 serial featuring Commander Cody's trip to the moon.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Chris T. jeopardizes the $1 million dollar prize with his inability to move on from Shanley. And when Ryan's journals go missing, he finds comfort in Kayla, who is also finding comfort in Wes.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Tensions explode between Jacy and Simone as both girls fight for John's affections. Things heat up when Brittany and Adam take a trip to the Boom-Boom Room. The challenge reveals embarrassing secrets about the girls' old habits.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: A challenge invites the guys' exes to dish dirt and spend the evening in the house. Brittany has trouble grasping the obvious message that Adam is not interested. Coleysia and Ashleigh ignite romances of their own.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Tensions between John and Simone reach a boiling point. Kayla's interest in Wes in renewed even though she is still holding onto Ryan. Spirits are raised when a waterfall challenge sends two couples to the Truth Booth.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The house conspires to figure out the next perfect couple. Kayla is called out for playing Ryan and Wes, while Simone tries to break up Chris T and Shanley for good. And a trip to the Truth Booth sends the house into chaos.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The house is left reeling after Paige and Chris T are confirmed as a perfect match and sent to the Honeymoon Suite. Shanley is devastated by being separated from Chris T. And Kayla loses it when Ryan goes to comfort Jessica.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Kayla and Ryan get into a heated argument but the house turns on Kayla when she reveals sensitive information that threatens Amber's relationship with Ethan. A slippery challenge questions some couples ability to hang together.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: At the White Party the house lets loose and has fun, but John must come to terms with Jacy's growing feelings for Scali. A beach side challenge forces couples to get down and sandy.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The house tries to figure out how to use their last chances to find their perfect match and win the million dollars. Jacy confronts her feelings for Scali and John, as the house tries to solve the last remaining love triangle.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The 20 cast members reunite with host Ryan Devlin for an intimate discussion of everything that happened in Hawaii. Includes never before seen footage, shocking revelations, and the dirt about which couples are still together.

programme.title: Ex on The Beach
programme.desc: 10 Reality celebs arrive in a winter wonderland to see if they can find their Next for cuffing season. What they don't know is that their Exes will be crashing in like an avalanche.

programme.title: Ex on The Beach

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni joins Mike for his motivational speech at a rehab facility, Pauly arrives for family dinner, and Angelina pushes Vinny too far in their love-hate relationship.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Mike competes in a burger-eating contest, Nicole takes a pregnancy test, and history repeats itself when Ronnie gets into hot water (literally) with another woman.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The roommates come up with an elaborate scheme to kidnap Deena and bring her to the house, while newly single Ronnie takes time to himself to come to terms with his breakup.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The roommates throw a party with Slip 'N Slides, bounce castles and more, and a night out heats up when a stranger pushes Ronnie to his breaking point.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: A call from home leaves Ronnie worried and everyone else skeptical, and the roommates help Deena honor her father's memory and fight cancer with a fundraiser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: As Mike prepares for both a jail sentencing and his wedding, the ladies take his fiancee Lauren to a wedding dress fitting, and Jenni shuts down discussions about her divorce.

programme.desc: Juliette is isolated from everyone when Chloe threatens legal action. Garrett and Cara continue to struggle with their relationship. Madisson doubts Amanda's intentions with Brandon. Jared and Kelsey explore their chemistry.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Bernardo, el ex de Mari F, llega a duras penas y la tableta los enfrenta para lavar sus trapos sucios. La casa se vuelve de nuevo contra Let. Hadad, Bernardo y Julio reciben a otra ex y ella tiene que elegir entre Julio y Hadad.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: La Venganza de los Ex: Caribe comienza con una fiesta en un barco en el Caribe. Hadad es el primer ex en llegar. Ortega se divide entre Camila y Mariana. Entre discusión y discusión, los participantes acaban buscando a un nuevo ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a successful country music star is murdered, the promoter she fired – Steve Fisher – becomes the logical suspect.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: An old friend of Matlock has been accused of murdering his cheating partner, but when Matlock finds out that others were also the targets of her swindles, the list of suspects grows

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock is disturbed by frightening dreams that apparently give him clues to the murder of a doctor at a clinic patronized by celebrities. He even begins to wonder if he’s psychic.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock upjocks the secret of a young piano student’s supposed suicide and discovers the keys to her death are jealousy, adultery, and blind ambition when a piano competition becomes more than just a musical affair.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ignoring her father’s warnings, Leanne Mcintyre agrees to defend charismatic philanthropist Gil Stoddard, accused of brutally murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Viewing a heated argument from his hotel window, Matlock witnesses a murder involving two stars of a local theater production and an unhappy husband. When he helps investigate the case, his memory becomes a bit blurred.

programme.title: Skin Tight
programme.desc: Antonia overcame her food addiction to lose 190lbs, but the extra skin is keeping her from feeling confident and sexy; Natasha lost almost 300lbs after gastric bypass surgery, but now struggles with carrying a lot of saggy excess skin.

programme.title: Skin Tight
programme.desc: Lauana's excess skin overpowers her frame; Tim's extra skin makes it difficult to be a great dad; facts and bonus scenes.

programme.title: Skin Tight
programme.desc: After her husband suddenly passes away, Jenae reaches 512 pounds, but her excess skin hides her weight loss; Julie's excess skin provides a constant reminder of her obesity and how it damaged her marriage.

programme.title: Skin Tight
programme.desc: Tamika finds a partner who makes her feel happy, but she feels uncomfortable due to her excess skin; Emilly blames herself for her son's weight gain, and, now, they both struggle with the pain loose skin has brought into their lives.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A teenager who has been hiding a rare condition undergoes surgery, doctors attempt to diagnose a young girl born with dark hair covering her entire body and a man with tree like growths encasing his hands and feet seeks treatment.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A look at the lives of four pairs of conjoined twins; they manage to lead remarkably normal lives despite their conditions.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A man's maimed hand is sewn into his stomach to avoid amputation; a young girl is born with a deformed mouth and jaw; a boy's organs are inverted; a man who can't smile finds love; with bonus content.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A girl lives with ants in her head; a man undergoes surgery to remove his 132-lb tumor; a woman with a large facial tumor contemplates a life-changing surgery.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A woman suffers from cyclical vomiting syndrome; a man with warts all over his body searches for cures; a girl fights for a surgery that could allow her to speak for the first time; with bonus content.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A man who had a full-face transplant faces another life-threatening challenge; a boy with a talent for singing is prematurely aging; in a Peruvian village, boys and men go blind by the age of 50.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A boy tries to get his balloon facial tumor removed; a woman who is allergic to UV light must take precautions; a woman fears her birthmark is still growing; a boy with undeveloped legs walks on all fours; with bonus content.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: Two-year-old Indonesian chain smoker; young man with facial tumor may not survive surgery; seven-year-old twins attached at the head.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: Doctors operate on a huge neck tumor; an English teen is diagnosed with a rare aging condition; an Indian baby is born with an extra head.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A man whose body is eating itself hopes surgery can cure him and save his life; a gymnast who lost her leg to cancer hopes her new prosthetic will keep her performing; the shortest living man in the world looks for a diagnosis.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A teen who has aged prematurely; a school teacher who cries crystals; a mother with very brittle bones; a boy with butterfly skin.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A look at a wibbly wobbly man, a Frenchman with a rare shaking condition and an American woman with an enormous stomach tumor.

programme.title: Body Bizarre

programme.desc: Local bootleggers come under suspicion after the disappearance of a government inspector.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Vandalism and violence send shock waves through Midsomer's cloistered nunnery.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate whether competition between ornithology enthusiasts led to murder.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The DeQuettevilles and the Fleetwoods have been enemies since the English Civil War. Now, the DeQuettevilles are dying after seeing a headless horseman. Is the ancient feud to blame?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a barrister is killed, suspicion falls on convicted killer Grady Felton. Barnaby suspects he is working with an accomplice – until Grady himself is targeted in an arson attack.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: During a total eclipse of the sun, an astronomer is bludgeoned to death by a meteor, and an astrologer claims to have predicted each subsequent murder.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A film historian writing about a 1960s horror actress is killed in her home. It becomes the start of what appear to be a series of copycat murders based on the actress' films.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a young girl wakes up from a mysterious coma, she finds that no one knows what happened to her boyfriend who disappeared around the same time she was attacked.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: At the factory where the world-famous Midsomer Blue Cheese is made, a dairy worker is brutally murdered by a giant round of weaponized cheese.

programme.desc: Josh Flagg lists a mid-century modern and must fight off developers who want to bulldoze it; Josh and Heather return home from their wedding to find their dream house; James and David are asked to help a developer who previously rejected them.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Madison goes up against David and James for a compound; Josh Flagg lists a historical home; Josh Altman risks his relationship with one of his best clients and friends.

programme.desc: Josh Altman is preoccupied with Heather's pregnancy; Josh Flagg is ready to dance to the top of the market while waltzing down the aisle with his fiancé; James has unresolved issues with Madison over a huge listing; a new realtor enters the fray.

programme.desc: Steve tries to find a buyer for a charming country home on a piece of land in Upstate New York; Ryan has two weeks to work his magic on a skyscraper; Fredrik tries to impress his clients by selling an apartment to actor Bruce Willis.

programme.desc: Ryan is challenged with selling the biggest townhouse in the neighborhood; Steve tries to sell an apartment with a location flaw; Fredrik gets creative to market a billion-dollar project that's in shambles; Ryan and Emilia make a major decision.
